---
title: "Storytelling with GeoLibre (Full workshop)"
subtitle: "A hands-on workshop for creating interactive story maps and 3D tours with GeoLibre."
author: "Ujaval Gandhi"
fontsize: 12pt
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 2
    highlight: pygments
    includes:
      in_header:
        - copy-code.html
        - GA_Script.html
      after_body: comment.html
      
  # word_document:
  #   toc: false
  #   fig_caption: false
  # pdf_document:
  #   latex_engine: xelatex
  #   toc: yes
  #   toc_depth: 3
header-includes:
- \usepackage{fancyhdr}
- \pagestyle{fancy}
- \renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0.4pt}
- \fancyhead[LE,RO]{\thepage}
- \geometry{left=1in,top=0.75in,bottom=0.75in}
- \fancyfoot[CE,CO]{{\includegraphics[height=0.5cm]{images/cc-by-nc.png}} Ujaval Gandhi http://www.spatialthoughts.com}
classoption: a4paper
---

\newpage

***

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='75%', out.width='250pt'}
knitr::include_graphics('images/spatial_thoughts_logo.png')
```

***

> This workshop is under development and not yet ready.

\newpage

# Introduction 

[GeoLibre](https://geolibre.app/) is a free and open-source tool for cloud-native geospatial workflows that run in your browser. It is a full featured GIS that can be used for visualizing, exploring, and analyzing geospatial data. One of the stand-out features of the platform is the ability to author interactive story maps and render 3D tours. This workshop gives you hands-on experience with GeoLibre to create and publish story maps using geospatial data.

# Data Credits

* Anti-shipping Activity Messages: [Maritime Safety Information portal](https://msi.nga.mil/NGAPortal/MSI.porta) , National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency. Data downloaded from [ASAM Geospatial Files](https://msi.nga.mil/Piracy).

# License

This workshop material is licensed under a [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). You are free to re-use and adapt the material but are required to give appropriate credit to the original author as below:

*Storytelling with GeoLibre* by Ujaval Gandhi [www.spatialthoughts.com](https://spatialthoughts.com)


&copy; 2026 Spatial Thoughts [www.spatialthoughts.com](https://spatialthoughts.com)
